goal: help the family know what matters right now

constraints.device: shared 4K TV, viewed from across a room
constraints.interaction: ambient by default; voice ('Hey Homer') and gesture optional
constraints.glanceability: primary signal readable in under 2 seconds

design_principles: one primary thing, clearly, before secondary things
low cognitive load — group related items
deterministic derived state drives UI visibility
simple web UI — cards, lists, overlays only

cards.note: renders Dinner Tonight / Lunch / Morning Checklist depending on flags
